apiKey.description: An API key which has write permissions to the Algolia Insights API
apiKey.label: apiKey

actions.name: Algolia Browser Plugin
actions.description: Enriches all Segment payloads with the Algolia query_id value
actions.defaultTrigger: type = "track" or type = "identify" or type = "page" or type = "group" or type = "alias"

actions.name: Conversion Events
actions.description: In ecommerce, conversions are purchase or add-to-cart events often but not always involving multiple products. Outside of ecommerce, a conversion can be any positive signal associated with an index record. Query ID is optional and indicates that the event is the result of a search query.

fields.label: Event Subtype
fields.description: Sub-type of the event, "purchase" or "addToCart".

fields.label: Product Details
fields.description: Populates the ObjectIDs field in the Algolia Insights API. An array of objects representing the purchased items. Each object must contain a product_id field.

products.title: Product Details
products.description: Populates the ObjectIDs field in the Algolia Insights API. An array of objects representing the purchased items. Each object must contain a product_id field.

fields.label: Index
fields.description: Name of the targeted search index.

index.title: Index
index.description: Name of the targeted search index.

fields.label: Query ID
fields.description: Query ID of the list on which the item was purchased.

queryID.title: Query ID
queryID.description: Query ID of the list on which the item was purchased.

fields.label: User Token
fields.description: The ID associated with the user. If a user is authenticated, this should be set to the same value as the Authenticated User Token

userToken.title: User Token
userToken.description: The ID associated with the user. If a user is authenticated, this should be set to the same value as the Authenticated User Token

fields.label: Authenticated User Token
fields.description: The authenticated ID associated with the user.

authenticatedUserToken.title: Authenticated User Token
authenticatedUserToken.description: The authenticated ID associated with the user.

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: The timestamp of the event.

fields.label: Value
fields.description: The value of the cart that is being converted.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value of the cart that is being converted.

fields.label: Currency
fields.description: Currency of the objects associated with the event in 3-letter ISO 4217 format. Required when `value` or `price` is set.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Currency of the objects associated with the event in 3-letter ISO 4217 format. Required when `value` or `price` is set.

fields.label: Extra Properties
fields.description: Additional fields for this event. This field may be useful for Algolia Insights fields which are not mapped in Segment.

extraProperties.title: Extra Properties
extraProperties.description: Additional fields for this event. This field may be useful for Algolia Insights fields which are not mapped in Segment.

fields.label: Event Name
fields.description: The name of the event to send to Algolia. Defaults to 'Conversion Event'

eventName.title: Event Name
eventName.description: The name of the event to send to Algolia. Defaults to 'Conversion Event'

fields.label: Event Type
fields.description: The type of event to send to Algolia. Defaults to 'conversion'

eventType.title: Event Type
eventType.description: The type of event to send to Algolia. Defaults to 'conversion'

actions.name: Product Added Events
actions.description: Product added events for ecommerce use cases for a customer adding an item to their cart. Query ID is optional and indicates that the event was the result of a search query.

fields.label: Product ID
fields.description: Populates the ObjectIds field in the Algolia Insights API with a single ObjectId (productId) of the product added.

product.title: Product ID
product.description: Populates the ObjectIds field in the Algolia Insights API with a single ObjectId (productId) of the product added.

fields.label: Index
fields.description: Name of the targeted search index.

index.title: Index
index.description: Name of the targeted search index.

fields.label: Query ID
fields.description: Query ID of the list on which the item was purchased.

queryID.title: Query ID
queryID.description: Query ID of the list on which the item was purchased.

fields.label: User Token
fields.description: The ID associated with the user.

userToken.title: User Token
userToken.description: The ID associated with the user.

fields.label: Authenticated User Token
fields.description: The authenticated ID associated with the user.

authenticatedUserToken.title: Authenticated User Token
authenticatedUserToken.description: The authenticated ID associated with the user.

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: The timestamp of the event.

fields.label: Extra Properties
fields.description: Additional fields for this event. This field may be useful for Algolia Insights fields which are not mapped in Segment.

extraProperties.title: Extra Properties
extraProperties.description: Additional fields for this event. This field may be useful for Algolia Insights fields which are not mapped in Segment.

fields.label: Event Name
fields.description: The name of the event to be send to Algolia. Defaults to 'Add to cart'

eventName.title: Event Name
eventName.description: The name of the event to be send to Algolia. Defaults to 'Add to cart'

fields.label: Event Type
fields.description: The type of event to send to Algolia. Defaults to 'conversion'

eventType.title: Event Type
eventType.description: The type of event to send to Algolia. Defaults to 'conversion'

actions.name: Product Clicked Events
actions.description: When a product is clicked within an Algolia Search, Recommend or Predict result

fields.label: Product ID
fields.description: Populates the ObjectIds field in the Algolia Insights API. Product ID of the clicked item.

objectID.title: Product ID
objectID.description: Populates the ObjectIds field in the Algolia Insights API. Product ID of the clicked item.

fields.label: Index
fields.description: Name of the targeted search index.

index.title: Index
index.description: Name of the targeted search index.

fields.label: Query ID
fields.description: Query ID of the list on which the item was clicked.

queryID.title: Query ID
queryID.description: Query ID of the list on which the item was clicked.

fields.label: Position
fields.description: Position of the click in the list of Algolia search results. Positions should start from 1, not 0.

position.title: Position
position.description: Position of the click in the list of Algolia search results. Positions should start from 1, not 0.

eventType.description: The type of event to send to Algolia. Defaults to 'click'

actions.name: Product List Filtered Events
actions.description: When a product list is filtered within an Algolia Search

fields.label: Filters
fields.description: Populates the filters field in the Algolia Insights API, a list of up to 10 facet filters. Field should be an array of strings with format ${attribute}:${value}.

filters.description: Populates the filters field in the Algolia Insights API, a list of up to 10 facet filters. Field should be an array of strings with format ${attribute}:${value}.

actions.name: Product List Viewed Events
actions.description: Product list viewed events act as a positive signal for associated record objects — the associated Product IDs. Query ID is optional and indicates that the view events are the result of a search query.

fields.label: Product Details
fields.description: The viewed products. Populates the ObjectIDs field in the Algolia Insights API. Each object must contain a product_id field.

products.title: Product Details
products.description: The viewed products. Populates the ObjectIDs field in the Algolia Insights API. Each object must contain a product_id field.

product_id.title: product_id
product_id.description: The unique ID of the product.

fields.label: Index
fields.description: Name of the targeted search index.

index.description: Name of the targeted search index.

fields.label: Query ID
fields.description: Query ID of the list on which the items were viewed.
